articles.author: Leslie Josephs
articles.title: American Airlines picks SpaceX's Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 planes - CNBC
articles.description: American Airlines said it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes.
articles.content: American Airlines plans to outfit more than 500 of its narrow-body aircraft with Starlink, handing another win to Elon Musk's SpaceX unit that has made inroads with major carriers for in-flight Wi-Fi… [+1283 chars]

articles.title: Rubio says US-Iran peace deal could take ‘a few more days’ - politico.eu
